use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in hero sections, pricing tables, and landing pages
Secondary navigation actions in forms, modals, and overlays
Destructive action buttons for delete, cancel, or warning states
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and mobile interfaces
Link-styled buttons for inline navigation within text content
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for consistent styling, and includes full keyboard accessibility. Supports asChild prop for polymorphic behavior and ring-based focus states.
